name: Irish Cream Beverage Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor with metal blade, combine all ingredients.
2. Cover and blend at medium-low speed until smooth.
3. Pour into freezer container.
4. Freeze for at least several hours before using.
5. To serve, stir 2 level teaspoons of the mix into 6 ounces hot coffee.
6. The mixture can be stored in the freezer for several months.
